[com.nomagic.magicdraw.esi.EsiUtils.getNewBranch(ProjectDescriptor, long, String, String)](com/nomagic/magicdraw/esi/EsiUtils.html#getNewBranch(com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.project.ProjectDescriptor,long,java.lang.String,java.lang.String))
BranchInfo is not exposed into Open API. Use [`EsiUtils.getNewEsiBranch(ProjectDescriptor, long, String, String)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/esi/EsiUtils.html#getNewEsiBranch(com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.project.ProjectDescriptor,long,java.lang.String,java.lang.String))

Description

- Deprecated Classes
Class
Description
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.ApplicationConstants](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/ApplicationConstants.html)
use [`Application`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/Application.html)
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.project.ProjectEventListenerAdapter2](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/project/ProjectEventListenerAdapter2.html)
all methods are implemented in super class [`ProjectEventListenerAdapter`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/project/ProjectEventListenerAdapter.html), use [`ProjectEventListenerAdapter`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/project/ProjectEventListenerAdapter.html)
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.dependencymatrix.datamodel.cell.ReadOnlyFlags](com/nomagic/magicdraw/dependencymatrix/datamodel/cell/ReadOnlyFlags.html)
read only cell views are deprecated, to check whether the cell is editable or not you have try creating a criteria on the cell
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.magicreport.tools.ExportTool2](com/nomagic/magicdraw/magicreport/tools/ExportTool2.html)

[com.nomagic.magicdraw.resources.CommandResource](com/nomagic/magicdraw/resources/CommandResource.html)
use [`DialogResource`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/resources/DialogResource.html)
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.resources.MenuResource](com/nomagic/magicdraw/resources/MenuResource.html)
use [`DialogResource`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/resources/DialogResource.html)
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.resources.ToolTipResource](com/nomagic/magicdraw/resources/ToolTipResource.html)
use [`DialogResource`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/resources/DialogResource.html)
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.teamwork2.esi.protect.CommandLinePasswordManager](com/nomagic/magicdraw/teamwork2/esi/protect/CommandLinePasswordManager.html)
CommandLinePasswordManager does not add new functions to [`PasswordManager`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/teamwork2/esi/protect/PasswordManager.html) and will be removed from Open API.
 Use [`PasswordManager`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/teamwork2/esi/protect/PasswordManager.html) instead, create it using [`EsiUtils.getPasswordManager(com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.project.ProjectDescriptor)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/esi/EsiUtils.html#getPasswordManager(com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.project.ProjectDescriptor)).
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.BitmapIconControler](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/BitmapIconControler.html)
use [`IconsFactory`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/icons/IconsFactory.html)
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.ImageIconProxy](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/ImageIconProxy.html)
use [`IconsFactory`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/icons/IconsFactory.html)
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.ResizableIconHelper](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/ResizableIconHelper.html)
use [`IconsFactory`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/icons/IconsFactory.html)
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.VectorImageIconControler](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/VectorImageIconControler.html)

[com.nomagic.magicdraw.uml.ElementFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/ElementFinder.html)
use [`Finder`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.html)
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.uml.symbols.paths.PathRenderer](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/symbols/paths/PathRenderer.html)
use [`PathElementRenderer`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/symbols/paths/PathElementRenderer.html) which also allows decorating the path while creating a new one, which is not yet connected in the model.
[com.nomagic.uaf.report.ReportProfile](com/nomagic/uaf/report/ReportProfile.html)
use [`ReportProfile`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/magicreport/ReportProfile.html)
[com.nomagic.ui.ImageFormat](com/nomagic/ui/ImageFormat.html)
use [`ScalableImageIcon`](com/nomagic/ui/ScalableImageIcon.html) to load icons of any supported format
[com.nomagic.ui.ImageHelper](com/nomagic/ui/ImageHelper.html)
use [`ScalableImageIcon`](com/nomagic/ui/ScalableImageIcon.html) to load icons of any supported format
[com.nomagic.ui.RasterImageFormat](com/nomagic/ui/RasterImageFormat.html)
use [`ScalableImageIcon`](com/nomagic/ui/ScalableImageIcon.html) to load icons of any supported format
[com.nomagic.ui.SwingImageIcon](com/nomagic/ui/SwingImageIcon.html)
use [`ScalableImageIcon`](com/nomagic/ui/ScalableImageIcon.html)
[com.nomagic.ui.VectorImageFormat](com/nomagic/ui/VectorImageFormat.html)
use [`ScalableImageIcon`](com/nomagic/ui/ScalableImageIcon.html) to load icons of any supported format
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.helpers.StereotypeByProfileCache](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/helpers/StereotypeByProfileCache.html)
Profile should extend [`ProfileImplementation`](com/nomagic/profiles/ProfileImplementation.html). Re-generate the profile class using
 "Generate Profile Class Implementation" action from the Development Tools plugin

[com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.ApplicationConstants.MAGICDRAW_NAME](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/ApplicationConstants.html#MAGICDRAW_NAME)
Use [`RebrandingConfigurator.getProductName()`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/rebranding/RebrandingConfigurator.html#getProductName()) with no "UML" addition in name. Use {@link Application#runtimeInternal#MAGICDRAW_UML} if old reference is required (usually for import).

[com.nomagic.magicdraw.simulation.execution.SimulationExecution.getSimulationOptions()](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/execution/SimulationExecution.html#getSimulationOptions())
renamed to [`SimulationExecution.getOptions()`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/execution/SimulationExecution.html#getOptions())
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.simulation.execution.SimulationOptions.addOption(String, Object)](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/execution/SimulationOptions.html#addOption(java.lang.String,java.lang.Object))
use [`SimulationOptions.set(String, Object)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/execution/SimulationOptions.html#set(java.lang.String,java.lang.Object)) instead
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.simulation.execution.SimulationOptions.getOption(String)](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/execution/SimulationOptions.html#getOption(java.lang.String))
use shorter and more convenient [`SimulationOptions.get(String)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/execution/SimulationOptions.html#get(java.lang.String))
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.simulation.fuml.fUMLHelper.getObjectFromValueList(ValueList, Type, int)](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/fuml/fUMLHelper.html#getObjectFromValueList(fUML.Semantics.Classes.Kernel.ValueList,com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Type,int))
kept for backwards compatibility. Type argument is not used.
 Use [`fUMLHelper.getObjectFromValueList(ValueList, int, TypedElement)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/fuml/fUMLHelper.html#getObjectFromValueList(fUML.Semantics.Classes.Kernel.ValueList,int,com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.TypedElement)) instead, if primitive type conversion is needed.
 Use [`fUMLHelper.getObjectFromValueList(ValueList, int)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/fuml/fUMLHelper.html#getObjectFromValueList(fUML.Semantics.Classes.Kernel.ValueList,int)) to retrieve actual values from fUML model.
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.simulation.fuml.fUMLHelper.sendSignal(String, String)](com/nomagic/magicdraw/simulation/fuml/fUMLHelper.html#sendSignal(java.lang.String,java.lang.String))
use any other overloaded version which provides target Object_ or/and SignalInstance

[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.actions.BaseDiagramToolbarConfigurator.createSelectionStickyToolbar(ActionsManager, String)](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/actions/BaseDiagramToolbarConfigurator.html#createSelectionStickyToolbar(com.nomagic.actions.ActionsManager,java.lang.String))
use [`BaseDiagramToolbarConfigurator.createToolsToolbar(ActionsManager, String)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/actions/BaseDiagramToolbarConfigurator.html#createToolsToolbar(com.nomagic.actions.ActionsManager,java.lang.String)) and/or [`BaseDiagramToolbarConfigurator.createSelectionToolbar(ActionsManager, String)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/actions/BaseDiagramToolbarConfigurator.html#createSelectionToolbar(com.nomagic.actions.ActionsManager,java.lang.String))
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.browser.AdornmentNodeRenderer.addAdornment(IconAdornment)](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/browser/AdornmentNodeRenderer.html#addAdornment(com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.IconAdornment))
use [`TreeNodeAdornmentManager.addIconAdornment(com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.IconAdornment)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/browser/TreeNodeAdornmentManager.html#addIconAdornment(com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.IconAdornment))
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.browser.AdornmentNodeRenderer.removeAdornment(IconAdornment)](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/browser/AdornmentNodeRenderer.html#removeAdornment(com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.IconAdornment))
use [`TreeNodeAdornmentManager.removeIconAdornment(com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.IconAdornment)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/browser/TreeNodeAdornmentManager.html#removeIconAdornment(com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.IconAdornment))
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.DiagramWindow.getDiagramPresentationElement()](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/DiagramWindow.html#getDiagramPresentationElement())
use [`DiagramWindow.getAbstractDiagramPresentationElement()`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/DiagramWindow.html#getAbstractDiagramPresentationElement())
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.dialogs.MDDialogParentProvider.getDialogParent()](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/dialogs/MDDialogParentProvider.html#getDialogParent())
use [`MDDialogParentProvider.getDialogOwner()`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/dialogs/MDDialogParentProvider.html#getDialogOwner()). Frame is not always a good choice to pass as parent. Parent sometimes should be another dialog, not just a frame.
[com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.dnd.CustomDropDiagramHandlerFactory.register(CustomDragAndDropHandler)](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/dnd/CustomDropDiagramHandlerFactory.html#register(com.nomagic.magicdraw.ui.dnd.CustomDragAndDropHandler))

[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.helpers.StereotypeByProfileCache.getInternalInstance(Class<S>, T)](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/helpers/StereotypeByProfileCache.html#getInternalInstance(java.lang.Class,T))
This is only used for backwards compatibility with previously used `AbstractProjectService`
 

`return getOrCreateInstance(MyProfile.class, MyProfile::new, project);`
 

 or
 

`getOrCreateInstanceWithNullSupport(MyProfile.class, MyProfile::new, project);`
 

 should be used in place of this
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.reflect.AbstractRepository.isRawMode()](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/reflect/AbstractRepository.html#isRawMode())
not used
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.reflect.AbstractRepository.nextVersion()](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/reflect/AbstractRepository.html#nextVersion())
use {[`AbstractRepository.nextBasicVersion()`](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/reflect/AbstractRepository.html#nextBasicVersion())}
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.reflect.AbstractRepository.setRawMode(boolean)](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/reflect/AbstractRepository.html#setRawMode(boolean))
not used
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartEventSupport.registerConfig(Class<? extends Element>, Collection<SmartListenerConfig>, PropertyChangeListener)](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartEventSupport.html#registerConfig(java.lang.Class,java.util.Collection,java.beans.PropertyChangeListener))
[`SmartEventSupport.register(Registration)`](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartEventSupport.html#register(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.Registration)) method should be used instead of this method.
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartEventSupport.unregisterConfig(Class<? extends Element>, Collection<SmartListenerConfig>, PropertyChangeListener)](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartEventSupport.html#unregisterConfig(java.lang.Class,java.util.Collection,java.beans.PropertyChangeListener))
[`SmartEventSupport.unregister(Registration)`](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartEventSupport.html#unregister(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.Registration)) method should be used instead of this method.
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartListenerConfig.listenTo2(String, SmartListenerConfig)](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartListenerConfig.html#listenTo2(java.lang.String,com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartListenerConfig))
use [`SmartListenerConfig.listenTo(String, SmartListenerConfig)`](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartListenerConfig.html#listenTo(java.lang.String,com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartListenerConfig)), because it merges configs too.
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartPropertyChangeListener.mergeConfigurations(SmartListenerConfig, SmartListenerConfig)](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartPropertyChangeListener.html#mergeConfigurations(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartListenerConfig,com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartListenerConfig))
use [`SmartListenerConfig.mergeConfigurations(SmartListenerConfig, SmartListenerConfig)`](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartListenerConfig.html#mergeConfigurations(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartListenerConfig,com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartListenerConfig))
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener.SmartPropertyChangeListener.mergeConfigurations(Collection<SmartListenerConfig>)](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartPropertyChangeListener.html#mergeConfigurations(java.util.Collection))
use [`SmartListenerConfig.mergeConfigurations(Collection)`](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartListenerConfig.html#mergeConfigurations(java.util.Collection))
[com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.metadata.UMLFactory.setRepository(AbstractRepository)](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/metadata/UMLFactory.html#setRepository(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.reflect.AbstractRepository))
The method should not be used. The method allows to set a project's repository to the factory
 and the factory creates elements in the project's repository. This creates following unwanted consequences:
 UMLFactory.eINSTANCE object overlives a project's repository instance.
 So after a project's closing it might be used to create elements in already closed project.
If a code sets a project's repository and forgets to change it then after switch
 to another project all elements will be created in the previous project.
It allows to create a deadlock condition. The code that sets the project's repository must take care that
 all elements in the project are already loaded and to assure that no elements can be unloaded.
 It makes the code difficult to implement.

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="deprecation-comment">use <a href="com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/dialogs/MDDialogParentProvider.html#getDialogOwner()"><code>MDDialogParentProvider.getDialogOwner()</code></a>. <div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="deprecation-comment">This is only used for backwards compatibility with previously used <code>AbstractProjectService</code>
<br/>
<code>return getOrCreateInstance(MyProfile.class, MyProfile::new, project);</code>
<br/>
 or
 <br/>
<code>getOrCreateInstanceWithNullSupport(MyProfile.class, MyProfile::new, project);</code>
<br/>
 should be used in place of this</div>
</div>

<div class="col-summary-item-name even-row-color"><a href="com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/metadata/UMLFactory.html#setRepository(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.reflect.AbstractRepository)">com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.metadata.UMLFactory.setRepository<wbr/>(AbstractRepository)</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="deprecation-comment">The method should not be used. The method allows to set a project's repository to the factory
 and the factory creates elements in the project's repository. This creates following unwanted consequences:
 <ol>
<li>UMLFactory.eINSTANCE object overlives a project's repository instance.
     So after a project's closing it might be used to create elements in already closed project. </li>
<li>If a code sets a project's repository and forgets to change it then after switch
     to another project all elements    will be created in the previous project.</li>
<li>It allows to create a deadlock condition. The code that sets the project's repository must take care that
     all elements in the project are already loaded and to assure that no elements can be unloaded.
     It makes the code difficult to implement.</li>
</ol></div>
</div>
